title: cleisostoma montanum
intro: Cleisostoma montanum, also known as the Mountain Cleisostoma or the Himalayan Cleisostoma, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. Traditionally, this plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cleisostoma montanum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Cleisostoma montanum is often prepared as a herbal tea or powder, and it can also be used in traditional medicine practices as a tincture or infusion.
